name: Upgrade @clerk/clerk-expo to >=2.19.36 — route-protection bypass (CVE-2026-41248)
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L13-01] @clerk/shared@3.45.0 (via @clerk/clerk-expo@2.19.23) is vulnerable to a middleware route-protection bypass (CVE-2026-41248), fixed in >=3.47.4. Runtime mobile dep. Fix: bump @clerk/clerk-expo to >=2.19.36.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: apps/mobile depends on @clerk/clerk-expo 2.19.23, which resolves @clerk/shared 3.45.0; that upstream version is vulnerable to CVE-2026-41248 route-protection bypass and is fixed by @clerk/clerk-expo >=2.19.36 / @clerk/shared >=3.47.4. Variants: (1) package.json and lockfile no longer resolve vulnerable @clerk/shared 3.45.0 through the mobile Clerk Expo dependency; (2) protected mobile routes remain gated for signed-out or invalid-session users after the upgrade; (3) Clerk auth smoke tests still pass. Regression test/check: add or run a dependency assertion/audit that fails when @clerk/clerk-expo is below 2.19.36 or @clerk/shared 3.47.4 is absent, plus the relevant mobile auth route-protection test.
riskImpact: Authentication bypass on Clerk-protected mobile screens; attacker can reach routes meant to be behind auth guards.
